title: विठ्ठल कवचम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री विठ्ठल कवचम् ॥

ॐ अस्य श्री विठ्ठल कवचस्य ब्रह्मा ऋषिः।
अनुष्टुप् छन्दः। श्री विठ्ठलो देवता।
श्री विठ्ठल प्रीत्यर्थं जपे विनियोगः॥

विठ्ठलः पातु मे शीर्षं पाण्डुरङ्गो ललाटकम्।
पण्ढरीशो दृशौ पातु श्रवणे रुक्मिणीपतिः॥ १॥

नासिकां पुण्डरीकेशः पातु वक्त्रं जनार्दनः।
कण्ठं नारायणः पातु स्कन्धौ पातु गदाधरः॥ २॥

भुजौ गोविन्दपातु मे करौ पातु मुरारिहा।
हृदयं वासुदेवश्च उदरं मधुसूदनः॥ ३॥

नाभिं पद्मनाभः पातु कटिं श्रीधर एव च।
जानुनी चन्द्रभागेशो जङ्घे विष्णुपदप्रभुः॥ ४॥

पादौ द्वारकानाथश्च सर्वाङ्गं रुक्मिणीवरः।
इष्टिकास्थो हरिः पातु प्राच्यां पातु जगत्पतिः॥ ५॥

आग्नेय्यां माधवः पातु दक्षिणे केशवो ऽवतु।
नैरृत्यां नरसिंहश्च वायव्यां वामनो ऽवतु॥ ६॥

पश्चिमे पातु गोपालो उत्तरे पातु त्रिविक्रमः।
ऐशान्यां श्रीहरिः पातु ऊर्ध्वं पातु सनातनः॥ ७॥

अधस्तात् पातु कृष्णश्च सर्वतो विठ्ठलो ऽवतु।
य इदं कवचं दिव्यं विठ्ठलस्य महात्मनः॥ ८॥

पठेत् प्रातः समुत्थाय सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते।
सर्वरक्षाकरं पुण्यं सर्वसिद्धिप्रदायकम्॥ ९॥

॥ इति श्री विठ्ठल कवचम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Vitthal Kavacham ||

Om Asya Shri Vitthal Kavachasya Brahma Rishih |
Anushtup Chhandah | Shri Vitthalo Devata |
Shri Vitthal Prityartham Jape Viniyogah ||

Vitthalah Patu Me Shirsham Pandurango Lalatakam |
Pandharisho Drishau Patu Shravane Rukminipati || 1 ||

Nasikam Pundarikesah Patu Vaktram Janardanah |
Kantham Narayanah Patu Skandhau Patu Gadadharah || 2 ||

Bhujau Govinda Patu Me Karau Patu Murariha |
Hridayam Vasudevash Cha Udaram Madhusudanah || 3 ||

Nabhim Padmanabhah Patu Katim Shridhara Eva Cha |
Januni Chandrabhagesho Janghe Vishnupadaprabhuh || 4 ||

Padau Dvarakanathash Cha Sarvangam Rukminivara |
Ishtikastho Harih Patu Prachyam Patu Jagatpatih || 5 ||

Agneyam Madhavah Patu Dakshine Keshavo Avatu |
Nairityam Narasimhash Cha Vayavyam Vamano Avatu || 6 ||

Pashchime Patu Gopalo Uttare Patu Trivikramah |
Aishanyam Shriharih Patu Urdhvam Patu Sanatanah || 7 ||

Adhastat Patu Krishnash Cha Sarvato Vitthalo Avatu |
Ya Idam Kavacham Divyam Vitthalasya Mahatmanah || 8 ||

Pathet Pratah Samutthaya Sarvapapai Pramuchyate |
Sarvarakshakaram Punyam Sarvasiddhipradayakam || 9 ||

|| Iti Shri Vitthal Kavacham Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
श्री विठ्ठल कवच — सभी अंगों और दिशाओं की रक्षा के लिए।

मस्तक की रक्षा विठ्ठल करें, ललाट की पाण्डुरंग, नेत्रों की पंढरीश।

हृदय की रक्षा वासुदेव, उदर की मधुसूदन, नाभि की पद्मनाभ करें।

सभी दिशाओं में माधव, केशव, नरसिंह, गोपाल, त्रिविक्रम रक्षा करें।

इस दिव्य कवच को प्रातः पढ़ने से सर्वपाप नष्ट होते हैं।
benefits: Divine armor of Lord Vitthal for complete protection
Protects all body parts and all directions
Destroys all sins when recited in the morning
Grants all siddhis and spiritual fulfillment
Essential for Varkari devotees during pilgrimage
description: Vitthal Kavacham (विठ्ठल कवचम्) is a divine armor prayer for protection dedicated to Lord Vitthal. Rooted in Padma Purana / Varkari Tradition, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to grant all siddhis and spiritual fulfillment as well as protect all body parts and all directions. Additionally, it is known to destroy all sins when recited in the morning. This sacred text is ideally recited on Thursday (Guruvar) and during Ashadhi Ekadashi and Kartiki Ekadashi for enhanced blessings. Comprising 9 verses, it can be completed in approximately 5 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Vitthal Kavacham in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Vitthal Kavacham in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Divine armor of Lord Vitthal of Pandharpur for complete protection.
